plan.businessContext: Every referral is contacted within 4 business hours of intake, and the outcome is logged.

assumptions.text: Empire has not yet confirmed the intake form vendor's real webhook payload shape -- the correlation key field path (body.phone) is assumed, not verified against a real submitted payload. Compiling and deploying against this assumption risks silently correlating no referrals at all if the real field path differs.

escalation.reason: This ProcessContract has blocking assumptions that must be resolved before compiling. Resolve them (edit the contract and re-validate), or compile anyway once they no longer apply.
